pipeline_mode__provenance.reason: Default adaptive mode; appropriate for composite-complexity-4 feature with some ambiguity around step-completed granularity.

enabled__provenance.reason: Composite complexity 4 >= 3; JIT prompt refinement helps reduce drift across 9 phases on a three-item bundled task.

max_consecutive_fallbacks__provenance.reason: Default JIT max consecutive fallbacks unchanged.

max_cycles__provenance.reason: Bump default 1 to 2 because ambiguity score 2 (moderate) allows for at most one replan if Phase 1-2 research reveals step-completed granularity or Feature-query absence needs a design pivot; more than 2 cycles is wasteful for a feature with an explicit roadmap ground truth.

divergence_threshold__provenance.reason: Risk score 3 is medium; default divergence threshold is appropriate without over-sensitizing to normal refinements.

enabled__provenance.reason: Auto-detect; task was evaluated and found NOT ELIGIBLE (composite complexity 4 > 2, confidence 0.88 < 0.9). Explicit null preserves auto behavior for any future phase that re-evaluates.

confidence_threshold__provenance.reason: Default confidence threshold unchanged; composite 0.88 >> 0.7 so no clarification protocol triggered.

enabled__provenance.reason: Routing resolved to full_pipeline for feature task type; explicit null preserves auto behavior.

auto_select_template__provenance.reason: Default is false; no applicable template in skills/forge/templates/ matches ceos-agents plugin-internal work (api-endpoint, react-component, angular-component, database-migration, cli-tool, refactoring are all poor fits for a markdown plugin meta-feature).

dimension_weights__provenance.reason: Spec-heavy feature with detailed requirements per meta-agent-prompt rule 'recommend defaults (no override)' for this task class. Tier B security evaluation passed all 9 categories with no credential/auth/crypto changes, so no security-weight bump needed. No correctness-critical bugfix, so no correctness-weight bump needed. Weights sum to 1.0.

value__provenance.reason: Feature task type with full_pipeline routing action; all phases 0-9 active.
Default gates at Brainstorm (3), Specification (4), Planning (6) — appropriate for a feature with public-contract impact (state.json schema, webhook payloads, CLAUDE.md config contract).

mutation_threshold__provenance.reason: Default 70% mutation threshold appropriate for structural-grep tests; higher threshold unnecessary for markdown-only changes.

triage_enabled__provenance.reason: Default disabled; not needed for feature task with explicit roadmap ground truth.
